stemHtml:
While approaching your destination aerodrome you receive the following message:

RVR RW 23: 400 m
This information indicates the:

options.a: length of runway which a pilot in an aircraft on the ground would see, on the threshold of runway 23.
options.c: minimum visibility at this aerodrome, with runway 23 being the one in service.
options.d: portion of runway which a pilot on the threshold of any of the runways would see, with runway 23 in service.
